name: Potion Seller
short_description: Potion Seller is a medieval simulation game where you step into the shoes of a wizard trying to survive in the cutthroat world of alchemy. As the owner of a humble potion shop, your goal is to master the art of potion brewing and make a name for yourself in busy medieval markets.
detailed_description:
• Brew Magical Potions: Use multiple ingredients to craft powerful potions. Each new day will allow you to expand your store inventory.

  • Run Your Shop: Use your gold to upgrade your potion shop. Customers will get more difficult to manage each day and you must be dexterous to complete the orders.

  • Face Challenges: your daily goal will increase the further you get through the campaign, you need to prioritize the right customers and think on your feet to successfully pass the levels.
